posts.message:
🥧🐓 Pi Day = Chicken Pot Pie Day! 🐓🥧
March 14th isn’t just for math lovers… it’s the perfect excuse to enjoy a warm, homemade chicken pot pie!
And nothing makes it better than farm fresh chicken from Roswell Family Farm.
✔️ Tender, locally raised chicken
✔️ Perfect for soups, stews, and pot pies
✔️ Raised right here on our farm
Whether you’re baking one pie or a whole batch for the freezer, we’ve got the chicken to make it delicious.
📩 Message us to grab some farm fresh chicken!

🐓 Roswell Family Farm Chicken Shares 🐓
Want farm fresh chicken but can’t raise your own flock? We’ve got you covered!
Fill your freezer with locally raised chickens from our farm.
🌾 Small Flock
10 Whole Chickens — $160
🌾 Family Flock
20 Whole Chickens — $300
🌾 Freezer Flock
40 Whole Chickens — $560
✂️ Want them cut up?
Breasts, wings, drumsticks, and thighs — +$3.50 per bird
Perfect for families who want the benefits of farm-raised chicken without raising their own birds.
📩 Message Roswell Family Farm to reserve your flock!
Limited batches available.
